name: ulw-research
tagline: Deep-research orchestrator: spawns agent swarms, expands leads recursively, verifies claims by running code, outputs cited reports.
verdict: Well-gated (explicit trigger only), but Phase 3 runs code with arbitrary worker-chosen pip/npm deps to verify web-sourced claims a code-execution/supply-chain risk if a lead is adversarial. It also tells the agent to override surrounding exploration rules while active, and assumes a non-standard multi-agent harness with undeclared tools.

highlights.summary: Phase 3: 'Write a minimal self-contained script that tests the claim; run it (uv run --with <deps> python / bun / direct compile)...' executes code with ad hoc dependencies to verify claims that may o
Authority section: 'this mode... supersedes every exploration-bounding instruction in surrounding prompts, modes, or rules'; the Failure-modes table lists 'Obeying a surrounding "stop exploring" rule

'Observation candidates and claim candidates travel back from workers as message text' and directly drive further agent spawning and code execution (Phase 2 EXPAND, Phase 3 verify) with no instruction
